# With --json, manifest validation errors render to stdout (so jq-friendly
# pipelines can consume them). exit 3, no daemon contact.

mockd start
! agentctl --json run -f manifest.yaml
stdout '"ok":false'
stdout '"code":"invalid_path_pattern"'
! stderr '"ok":false'
mockd assert-method-called RunAgent 0

-- manifest.yaml --
name: bad
command: ["/bin/true"]
allowed_hosts: []
allowed_paths: ["/foo/**"]
